name: Cajun Red Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: Water to cover beans plus 2 inches over
Salt and ground black pepper to taste
16 oz Rotel tomatoes with chili peppers
2 Whole bay leaves, removed before serving
1 lb German or Italian sausage, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 11 ingredients in a 6 or 12-quart Nesco.
2. Cover; soak overnight.
3. Drain off the soaking water.
4. Add the first 7 ingredients. Cover; cook 4 to 5 hours, adding water to cover beans if needed.
5. Increase the temperature to 325 degrees.
6. Add the remaining ingredients; stir. Cover; cook 2 to 2-1/2 hours or until thickened.
7. Serve over hot cooked rice.
